text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen upon Fuji Kiseki on my way home. She
invites me to watch an outdoor play, so I agree to
join her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
She's so good... Her singing and acting—no, every
part of her performance is stupendous!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The lead is a friend of my mother's. I've
known her since I was young.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I saw her. Would it be all
right if I went to say hi?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hello! Long time no see.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Fuji! Thanks for coming. ♪ You've
become even more beautiful since the last time I
saw you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, but having seen your performance
today, I know I'm no match for you.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
Why, you've not only grown more beautiful, but
your tongue's grown more gilded too! And who
might this be?
choice_data_list: Nice to meet you. I'm Fuji Kiseki's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so you're her trainer, are you? Hmm... Very
interesting.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text: She's quite the handful, is she not?

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
Why, we used to call this little imp "Prince
Mischief" in our company.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
She would scare the cast by hanging prop spiders
above their heads during breaks in rehearsal!

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
Then again, her pranks did help everyone laugh
and shake off their nerves, so there's that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha! That was so long ago. I don't pull such
childish pranks anymore.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
Really now? It's a shame to think we'll never be
able to see that sweet prince again.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, not you too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
You two are so close. ♪ It's a real treat to see
your bond together. Now then, please excuse me.
I have to change!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Sorry to keep you. I'll be sure to watch
your show if you ever have another performance
nearby.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
You are such a dear. Thank you. Oh, one moment.
I'd like a word with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm? Okay...

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text: ...I wanted her to become an actor, you know.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
I hoped that one day I could perform alongside
her in a supporting role while she took the stage
as the lead in a play for the ages.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
The thought that I'll never be able to do that has
been upsetting... but I feel much better now after
speaking with her.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
She looked so happy. It must be because she's
found a wonderful trainer and a home that makes
her happier than the stage did.

text_block_list.name: Stage Actor
text_block_list.text:
All of us from the theatre hope you'll take good
care of her. She's the apple of our eyes, and we
leave her to you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Welcome back. So, what'd you two talk about?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me she was telling you more
embarrassing stories from when I was young.
choice_data_list: Let's just say I have a lot of dirt on you now.
She just gave me tips on how to enjoy a play.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I knew it! So she was gossiping about me! What did she tell you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Is it now? Well, if I had to guess what you were
talking about... Oh.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Did she tell you something trivial, like how I
actually hate wearing high heels and used to
throw tantrums about it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hm, so that's a no...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Was it about the curtain? Maybe it was about
that one time we had five consecutive shows...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, whatever. They may be tricks I played as a
child, but I must own up to them regardless.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I don't think you'd leak my secrets
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She winks at me, and that effectively seals my
lips. Not that I ever doubted her, but she really
does have the true makings of an actor.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I'm sure she did!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Did you really think I would believe that?
You're so bad at lying.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Liars are good at seeing through lies, and the
best entertainers also happen to be the best liars
as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I couldn't trick her, I tell her about her
friend's dream and the wish she's entrusted me
with.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So she wanted to perform with me...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That future could have very well been a reality...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
However, I chose to walk a different path. But,
since she's giving me her blessing and wishing the
best for me...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to become an even greater entertainer
on the turf than the actors we saw on stage today!
choice_data_list:
Focus on your performance and leave the rest
to me!

Focus on your performance and leave the rest
to me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let's make me the best version of myself
ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stage isn't the only place Fuji Kiseki can
impress her fans. We chat about our future plans
the whole way home.
